subject.title: Anthropic documentation should include adaptive thinking.
subject.body:
### Description

Documentation includes the deprecated or soon-to-be deprecated thinking configuration, and it should also include how to specify adaptive thinking. 

https://ai-sdk.dev/providers/ai-sdk-providers/anthropic#reasoning

### AI SDK Version

_No response_

### Code of Conduct

- [x] I agree to follow this project's Code of Conduct
